title: CellRange
description: CellRange: Object representing an orthogonal range between two cell in the spreadsheet.

From.description: Starting (upper left) cell of the range. CellAddress: Object representing a cell address: its column index as string and row index as integer.

To.description: Ending (bottom right) cell of the range. CellAddress: Object representing a cell address: its column index as string and row index as integer.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
